feature: Fix dark mode in daily-view.tsx — explicit dark: variant classes

prompts.description: Add dark:bg-card dark:text-foreground to loading step list items
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, inside the isGeneratingMealPlan block, find the 3 bridge-note-strip divs in the loading message map. Add dark:bg-card dark:text-foreground to each.

prompts.description: Add dark:border-border to all hero-badge instances; dark: variants to meal type badge, recipe/swap hover, and Cards
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx: (1) add dark:border-border to all hero-badge bg-secondary elements, (2) add dark:bg-secondary dark:text-secondary-foreground to the meal type dashboard-meta-pill, (3) add dark:hover:bg-secondary to Recipe/Swap buttons, (4) add dark:bg-card dark:border-border to all bridge-section Cards.
